aeo_readiness.summary: Kailey Air Systems has a basic foundation for AEO but lacks critical optimizations for better search visibility and user engagement.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve local SEO.
Optimize website content with targeted HVAC and local service keywords.
Enhance the website's mobile responsiveness and page load speed.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes basic business information but lacks a comprehensive Google Business Profile (GBP).
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has not fully leveraged GBP, missing out on local search opportunities and customer engagement features.
critical_issues: Missing location-specific content and service details.

nap_citations.summary: Inconsistent or incomplete Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web are likely impacting local search performance.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Ensure NAP consistency on the website, social media, and local directories.
Claim and verify business listings on major platforms like Yelp, Bing, and Apple Maps.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized content and user-generated content (e.g., reviews, testimonials).
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC services in California.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding location-based service pages and customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative blog content about HVAC maintenance and local climate considerations.

page_title: Quality Air Systems Solutions from Kailey Air Systems
